remarks: Experience refined luxury in this expansive Westover home, discreetly nestled at the end of a tranquil driveway just moments from schools, highways, transportation, and Stamford and Greenwich amenities. The property is enveloped by lush mature landscaping and offers access to the sprawling beauty of Mianus River Park. Designed for both grand entertaining and effortless everyday living, this move-in ready home exudes timeless sophistication. The gourmet chef's kitchen, complete with an elegant butler's pantry, flows seamlessly into gracious open-concept living spaces. French doors throughout the main level open onto an expansive west-facing deck, perfectly positioned to capture breathtaking sunset views, while a sun-drenched patio just off the kitchen creates an exceptional indoor-outdoor lifestyle. The serene main-level primary suite is a luxurious and expansive, featuring dual walk-in closets and a spa-inspired bath with a Jacuzzi tub. The second level offers four generously proportioned bedrooms, including two en-suite bedrooms and two with a shared bath. Bathed in natural light, the home also features an extraordinary walk-out lower level with a private en-suite guest suite, spacious office, and an expansive recreation room anchored by a dramatic stone fireplace. Every detail of this exceptional residence has been thoughtfully curated to offer unparalleled comfort, elegance, and privacy.
